title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Fire-Boltt

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Fire-Boltt
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Fire-Boltt! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Allahabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Fire-Boltt:
Fire-Boltt is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fire-Boltt!
